messages.message: Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates. We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business. We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you. If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

I’m not looking for equipment right now, but I’ll let you know if/when I am again.
我现在不找设备，但如果/我再次需要，我会告诉你的。

Got it, Bianca 
Thanks for letting me know — totally understand.
明白了，比安卡 
谢谢告知——完全理解。

I’ll stay in touch from time to time with any new models or updates, just in case it’s helpful for you in the future.
Whenever you’re ready again, feel free to reach out anytime
